text_excerpt: News - Charlie Maynard MP Skip to main content Charlie Maynard MP Meet Charlie Contact Charlie Charlie's Campaigns Volunteer News Donate Join Donate Join Charlie's Campaigns Rebuilding Our Railway Clean Water and Fair Bills Backing Local Farmers Improving Local Healthcare Supporting Our Highstreets Cost of Living Crisis District Council Elections 2026 News Subscribe News from Charlie Maynard Oxfordshire Monthly news from Charlie Maynard MP - February 2026 This is the February edition of my newsletter, where I tell you what I've been up to both in the constituency and in Westminster over the last month. 28 Feb 2026 View Oxfordshire Monthly news from Charlie Maynard MP - January 2026 This is the January edition of my newsletter, where I tell you what I've been up to both in the constituency and in Westminster as we start 2026. 31 Jan 2026 View Oxfordshire Monthly news from Charlie Maynard MP - December 2025 This is the December edition of my newsletter, which is a special look back on some highlights 2025, as well as some news on just a few of the things I'll be working on in 2026. 24 Dec 2025 View Oxfordshire Monthly news from Charlie Maynard MP - November 2025 This is the November edition of my newsletter. It helps me to keep you posted on what I've been doing around the constituency and in Westminster, working on your behalf. 30 Nov 2025 View Oxfordshire Monthly news from Charlie Maynard MP - October 2025 This is the October edition of my newsletter. It helps me to keep you posted on what I've been doing around the constituency and in Westminster, working on your behalf. 5 Nov 2025 View Oxfordshire Monthly news from Charlie Maynard MP - September 2025 This is the September edition of my newsletter. It helps me to keep you posted on what I've been doing around the constituency and in Westminster, working on your behalf. It also includes my updates from the Lib Dem Autumn Conference! 30 Sep 2025 View 1 2 3 3 The Liberal Democrats will use your contact details to send you information on the topics you have requested. Any data we gather will be used in accordance with our privacy policy at www.libdems.org.uk/privacy . To exercise your legal data rights, email: data.protection@libdems.org.uk . We take accessibility and your data privacy seriously. Read our accessibility statement and cookie policy . Promoted by the Liberal Democrats , First Floor, 66 Buckingham Gate, London SW1E 6AU. Website by Prater Raines . This website uses cookies Please select the types of cookies you want to allow. Essential These are necessary for the website to function properly. Analytics These help us to understand how our visitors use our website. Marketing These allow us to display content from other websites that track you for advertising purposes.
